headline: Meta Platforms (META) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Meta Platforms (META) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
